title: Vanilla Cookbook
body:
There aren't many food recipes in minecraft. So I decided to added 16 new food items!
All new food items are made using the already ingame vanilla ingredients.

For example, Sweet Berry can now be used to make jam, jam sandwich and a fruit salad!
They are balanced, or at least I tried to make their values balanced accordingly to the game. As an example:

They are new foods, like the Meat Sandwich, that is slightly better than Steak, since it uses more ingredients.

**Supported in multiple languages:** spanish, galician, german, portuguese, english (uk & us)
